description: Two-pass video encoding (analysis pass). Mirrors `ffmpeg -y -i in.mp4 -c:v libx264 -b:v 2M -pass 1 -passlogfile prefix -an -f null /dev/null` for the canonical first pass that writes stats; the caller would then re-run the same job with pass: 2 against the same passlogfile prefix to consume those stats and write the final muxed output.
